# Freyr Technology AI

Freyr Technology AI is an AI infrastructure and model API service company. The public website currently presents model pricing and privacy information only.

Key pages:

- Pricing: https://www.freyrtech.ai/pricing.html
- Privacy Policy: https://www.freyrtech.ai/privacy.html

Machine-readable resources:

- Model catalog fallback: https://www.freyrtech.ai/assets/models.json
- Pricing fallback: https://www.freyrtech.ai/assets/pricing.json
- Sitemap: https://www.freyrtech.ai/sitemap.xml
